title: Exacompta - Ref 50300E - Elasticated Filing Archive Box - 270 x 340mm in Size, 25mm Spine, 600gsm Premium Pressboard, Elastic Closure - Assorted Colours (Pack of 8)
features: 27x34cm in size and can hold A4 documents
Made from 600 gsm 0.7 mm embossed genuine premium pressboard
25 mm spine and has a label for easy identification.
Elastic to hold the boxes closed when not in use
Come assembled and come in colours: Blue, Black, Green, Pink, Red, Turquoise and Yellow. The boxes come in a pack of 8 (colour quantity may vary per pack)
description: From the manufacturer Exacompta - Thinking Clearer, Going Further Exacompta originated in 1928, and is one of the best known brands for filing and office items. Over the past 30 years, the brand has expanded its production, and is home to a number of filing, desktop and office stationery products. Their wide product portfolio originates from the UK, including the Chartwell, Guildhall and pressboard designs.
